descriptionText: Bali 4.3 For Sale 2020 | Guest Cabins:4 | Crew Cabins:1| VAT Not PaidThe Bali 4.3 For Sale 2020 is an appealing opportunity for anyone looking for a comfortable, modern, and well‑kept cruising catamaran. Built by the respected Catana Group, this 2020 model combines thoughtful design with practical features that make life on board straightforward and enjoyable. She has had just one owner since new and has been maintained regularly, presenting today in good condition both inside and out. Currently lying in Campania under the Italian flag, she offers a solid balance between liveability, reliability, and performance.Specifications:• Shipyard: Catana Group • Model: Bali 4.3 • Year: 2020 • Length overall: 13.10 m • Beam: 7.12 m • Draft: 1.2 m • Displacement: 11,500 kg • Cabins: 4 double + 1 crew • Bathrooms: 4 • Engine type: Yanmar 4JH57 (2 x 57 HP) • Engine hours: approx. 1200 • Water capacity: 800 L • Solar panels: 120 A/h • Watermaker: 240 L/h • Inverters: 2 x Victron (4000 W total)General Design and Comfort • Emphasis on open spaces and comfort • Rigid forward cockpit • Saloon‑to‑cockpit open‑plan layout • Strong ventilation and natural light • Practical storage options for clutter‑free cruising • White fibreglass hullAccommodation • Four double cabins • One crew cabin • Convertible dinette berth • Four well‑designed bathrooms • Dark mahogany interior wood for a warm atmosphereGalley • Stove • Oven • 660‑litre fridge • Layout suitable for extended cruising or living aboardSailing and Handling • Mainsail and jib (both original) • Lewmar winches, including one electric winch • Saildrive transmission • Wheel steering for predictable manoeuvringEngines • Twin Yanmar 4JH57 engines • 57 HP each • Approximately 1200 engine hours (January 2026)Upgrades and Autonomy • Solar panels (120 A/h) • 240 L/h watermaker • Two Victron inverters in parallel (4000 W total)Navigation and Electronics • Raymarine plotter • Raymarine instruments • Autopilot • VHF • Wind instrumentationExterior Features • Bimini • Cockpit table • Lowering aft platform for water access or tender handlingAnchoring and Mooring • 15 kg anchor • 100 m of chain • Fenders • Mooring lines
descriptionHtml:
Bali 4.3 For Sale 2020 | Guest Cabins:4 | Crew Cabins:1| VAT Not Paid

The Bali 4.3 For Sale 2020 is an appealing opportunity for anyone looking for a comfortable, modern, and well‑kept cruising catamaran. Built by the respected Catana Group, this 2020 model combines thoughtful design with practical features that make life on board straightforward and enjoyable. She has had just one owner since new and has been maintained regularly, presenting today in good condition both inside and out. Currently lying in Campania under the Italian flag, she offers a solid balance between liveability, reliability, and performance.

Specifications:

• Shipyard: Catana Group
• Model: Bali 4.3
• Year: 2020
• Length overall: 13.10 m
• Beam: 7.12 m
• Draft: 1.2 m
• Displacement: 11,500 kg
• Cabins: 4 double + 1 crew
• Bathrooms: 4
• Engine type: Yanmar 4JH57 (2 x 57 HP)
• Engine hours: approx. 1200
• Water capacity: 800 L
• Solar panels: 120 A/h
• Watermaker: 240 L/h
• Inverters: 2 x Victron (4000 W total)

General Design and Comfort
• Emphasis on open spaces and comfort
• Rigid forward cockpit
• Saloon‑to‑cockpit open‑plan layout
• Strong ventilation and natural light
• Practical storage options for clutter‑free cruising
• White fibreglass hull

Accommodation
• Four double cabins
• One crew cabin
• Convertible dinette berth
• Four well‑designed bathrooms
• Dark mahogany interior wood for a warm atmosphere

Galley
• Stove
• Oven
• 660‑litre fridge
• Layout suitable for extended cruising or living aboard

Sailing and Handling
• Mainsail and jib (both original)
• Lewmar winches, including one electric winch
• Saildrive transmission
• Wheel steering for predictable manoeuvring

Engines
• Twin Yanmar 4JH57 engines
• 57 HP each
• Approximately 1200 engine hours (January 2026)

Upgrades and Autonomy
• Solar panels (120 A/h)
• 240 L/h watermaker
• Two Victron inverters in parallel (4000 W total)

Navigation and Electronics
• Raymarine plotter
• Raymarine instruments
• Autopilot
• VHF
• Wind instrumentation

Exterior Features
• Bimini
• Cockpit table
• Lowering aft platform for water access or tender handling

Anchoring and Mooring
• 15 kg anchor
• 100 m of chain
• Fenders
• Mooring lines
